{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales / Digital Marketer",
  "description": "LandMall.ng is Nigeria&#39;s Largest Online Real Estate Marketplace for Property Sales, Rental, investment &amp; Property Management using Modern Technology.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales / Digital Marketer
Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Sales Responsibilities:


	Identify and generate new leads through online and offline channels
	Follow up on inquiries and convert prospects into paying clients
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients
	Present and promote company products/services to potential customers
	Meet and exceed sales targets and KPIs
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities and customer interactions


Digital Marketing Responsibilities:


	Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns across platforms (Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, etc.)
	Create engaging content (posts, videos, captions) to attract and retain customers
	Manage social media accounts and respond to inquiries promptly
	Run and monitor paid ads (Meta Ads, Google Ads)
	Track performance metrics (reach, engagement, conversions) and optimize strategies
	Maintain and update website or landing pages (if applicable)


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an OND, HND, B.Sc in Marketing or any related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience
	Proven experience in sales and/or digital marketing
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Familiarity with social media marketing and online sales strategies
	Basic knowledge of content creation (graphics/video is a plus)
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Tech-savvy and comfortable with digital tools
	Must live on the Island


Key Skills:


	Sales &amp; Closing Skills
	Lead Generation
	Content Creation &amp; Copywriting
	Social Media Management
	Digital Advertising (Meta/Google Ads)
	Customer Relationship Management (CRM)
	Analytics &amp; Reporting.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidiates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrlandmall@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Sales / Digital Marketer Job at LandMall.ng




        
    

        
        LandMall.ng is Nigeria's Largest Online Real Estate Marketplace for Property Sales, Rental, investment & Property Management using Modern Technology.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales / Digital Marketer
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Sales Responsibilities:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and generate new leads through online and offline channels
	Follow up on inquiries and convert prospects into paying clients
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients
	Present and promote company products/services to potential customers
	Meet and exceed sales targets and KPIs
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities and customer interactions


Digital Marketing Responsibilities:


	Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns across platforms (Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, etc.)
	Create engaging content (posts, videos, captions) to attract and retain customers
	Manage social media accounts and respond to inquiries promptly
	Run and monitor paid ads (Meta Ads, Google Ads)
	Track performance metrics (reach, engagement, conversions) and optimize strategies
	Maintain and update website or landing pages (if applicable)


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an OND, HND, B.Sc in Marketing or any related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience
	Proven experience in sales and/or digital marketing
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Familiarity with social media marketing and online sales strategies
	Basic knowledge of content creation (graphics/video is a plus)
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Tech-savvy and comfortable with digital tools
	Must live on the Island


Key Skills:


	Sales & Closing Skills
	Lead Generation
	Content Creation & Copywriting
	Social Media Management
	Digital Advertising (Meta/Google Ads)
	Customer Relationship Management (CRM)
	Analytics & Reporting.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidiates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Warehouse / Logistics Manager",
  "description": "Food Concepts commenced operations in 2001. From inception, our aim has been clear-cut and focused: to revolutionize the food sector in West Africa and to deliver extraordinary satisfaction to our stakeholders.

Since launching in 2004, Chicken Republic (Subsidiary of Food concepts) has already opened 55 stores in Nigeria and Ghana. On this basis, we are proud of the brand&rsquo;s hard-earned reputation as the fastest growing chicken QSR in West Africa and the number 1 chicken QSR in Nigeria (both in revenues and number of outlets). In addition, Chicken Republic was ranked as one of Nigeria&rsquo;s top 20 brands across all categories (Financial Standards Awards 2009).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse / Logistics Manager

Requisition ID: 1884
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time
Grade Level:&nbsp;6
Department:&nbsp;Supply Chain Department
Reports to (Title):&nbsp;Senior Manager, Warehouse/Logistics
Direct Reports:&nbsp;Warehouse Supervisors/Officers, Drivers

Job Purpose


	To manage the various elements of the supply chain in such a manner that ensures goods and other inventory items are transported, stored and delivered on time and in good condition to the production units, the regional warehouse hubs and stores


Core Responsibilities and Key Result Areas
Warehouse Management:


	Strategically plan and manage logistics, warehouse, transportation and customer service in the inventory team
	Ensure timely receipt, storage and dispatch of goods
	Manage the logistics activities of the division including drivers and other ancillary staff while planning routes and processing shipments
	Maintain inventory control and management
	Ensure optimization of materials flow
	Ensure minimization of stock losses and receiving and or issuing lead times
	Meet cost, productivity, accuracy and timeliness targets
	Ensure control of all fixed and variable costs
	Work proactively with various departments to realize efficiencies and manage expectations


Risk Management:


	Minimize stock losses
	Ensure and monitor adherence to laws, regulations and OHS&amp;E requirements
	Ensure receipt of goods in line with specifications on Purchase Orders
	Keep track of quality, quantity, stock levels, delivery times, transport costs and efficiency
	Apply appropriate asset management procedures in order to achieve maximum return on assets
	Perform continuous evaluation of warehouse security and implementation of necessary measures to maintain safety of stock
	Develop preventative maintenance systems and contingency plans.
	Implement business continuity and resumption plans


Strategy and Advisory:


	Identify and implement cost saving measures to reduce Food Concepts&rsquo; cost of storing and handling goods/equipment
	Generate and and analyze reports at pre-defined and agreed intervals to aid decisions relating to inventory and working capital management
	Maintain metrics and analyze data to assess performance and implement improvement
	Supervise, coach and train the inventory team
	Active management of the warehouse annual expense budget


Key Performance Indicators


	Timeliness of delivery of stock items to various locations
	The quality/ yield of cost saving initiatives provided
	Quality of risk management/prevention of risk exposure in the warehouse


Knowledge Requirements:


	Knowledge of Inventory Management
	Knowledge of Cost management principles
	Knowledge of applicable legislations, as well as policies and procedures
	Demonstrates expertise in Warehouse and logistics management


Job Specifications
Educational Requirements:


	A good First Degree in Social / Management / Physical Sciences
	Possession of a Post graduate degree in Human Resources/Business Administration/Supply Chain Management or related field is an added advantage


Professional Requirements:


	Membership of the CIPS, CILS, CILCS, CISCOM, Lean Six Sigma or any other related professional qualification is required.


Experience Requirements:


	5-6 years&rsquo; experience in a similar role, especially in the QSR/Food Industry sector


Decision Expectations:


	Negotiate competitive quote on logistics cost
	Maintain inventory control and management
	Performs continuous evaluation of warehouse security
	Implements safety measures to ensure safety of stock


Working Conditions:


	Jobholder typically work 40 hours per week, Monday to Friday, although some roles may involve weekend or evening work.
	This role is both office and field(warehouse) based and has some occasional physical demands such as lifting stock items that weigh over 10kg if the need arises and walking round the warehouse to ensure the effective monitoring.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-09",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Food Concepts Plc"
    
  },

Warehouse / Logistics Manager Job at Food Concepts Plc




        
    

        
        Food Concepts commenced operations in 2001. From inception, our aim has been clear-cut and focused: to revolutionize the food sector in West Africa and to deliver extraordinary satisfaction to our stakeholders.

Since launching in 2004, Chicken Republic (Subsidiary of Food concepts) has already opened 55 stores in Nigeria and Ghana. On this basis, we are proud of the brand’s hard-earned reputation as the fastest growing chicken QSR in West Africa and the number 1 chicken QSR in Nigeria (both in revenues and number of outlets). In addition, Chicken Republic was ranked as one of Nigeria’s top 20 brands across all categories (Financial Standards Awards 2009).
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse / Logistics Manager

Requisition ID: 1884
Job Location: Abuja 
Employment Type: Full-time
Grade Level: 6
Department: Supply Chain Department
Reports to (Title): Senior Manager, Warehouse/Logistics
Direct Reports: Warehouse Supervisors/Officers, Drivers

Job Purpose


	To manage the various elements of the supply chain in such a manner that ensures goods and other inventory items are transported, stored and delivered on time and in good condition to the production units, the regional warehouse hubs and stores


Core Responsibilities and Key Result Areas
Warehouse Management:


	Strategically plan and manage logistics, warehouse, transportation and customer service in the inventory team
	Ensure timely receipt, storage and dispatch of goods
	Manage the logistics activities of the division including drivers and other ancillary staff while planning routes and processing shipments
	Maintain inventory control and management
	Ensure optimization of materials flow
	Ensure minimization of stock losses and receiving and or issuing lead times
	Meet cost, productivity, accuracy and timeliness targets
	Ensure control of all fixed and variable costs
	Work proactively with various departments to realize efficiencies and manage expectations


Risk Management:


	Minimize stock losses
	Ensure and monitor adherence to laws, regulations and OHS&E requirements
	Ensure receipt of goods in line with specifications on Purchase Orders
	Keep track of quality, quantity, stock levels, delivery times, transport costs and efficiency
	Apply appropriate asset management procedures in order to achieve maximum return on assets
	Perform continuous evaluation of warehouse security and implementation of necessary measures to maintain safety of stock
	Develop preventative maintenance systems and contingency plans.
	Implement business continuity and resumption plans


Strategy and Advisory:


	Identify and implement cost saving measures to reduce Food Concepts’ cost of storing and handling goods/equipment
	Generate and and analyze reports at pre-defined and agreed intervals to aid decisions relating to inventory and working capital management
	Maintain metrics and analyze data to assess performance and implement improvement
	Supervise, coach and train the inventory team
	Active management of the warehouse annual expense budget


Key Performance Indicators


	Timeliness of delivery of stock items to various locations
	The quality/ yield of cost saving initiatives provided
	Quality of risk management/prevention of risk exposure in the warehouse


Knowledge Requirements:


	Knowledge of Inventory Management
	Knowledge of Cost management principles
	Knowledge of applicable legislations, as well as policies and procedures
	Demonstrates expertise in Warehouse and logistics management


Job Specifications
Educational Requirements:


	A good First Degree in Social / Management / Physical Sciences
	Possession of a Post graduate degree in Human Resources/Business Administration/Supply Chain Management or related field is an added advantage


Professional Requirements:


	Membership of the CIPS, CILS, CILCS, CISCOM, Lean Six Sigma or any other related professional qualification is required.


Experience Requirements:


	5-6 years’ experience in a similar role, especially in the QSR/Food Industry sector


Decision Expectations:


	Negotiate competitive quote on logistics cost
	Maintain inventory control and management
	Performs continuous evaluation of warehouse security
	Implements safety measures to ensure safety of stock


Working Conditions:


	Jobholder typically work 40 hours per week, Monday to Friday, although some roles may involve weekend or evening work.
	This role is both office and field(warehouse) based and has some occasional physical demands such as lifting stock items that weigh over 10kg if the need arises and walking round the warehouse to ensure the effective monitoring.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketer",
  "description": "BluePeak HR Services is a trusted Human Resources consulting firm delivering recruitment and personnel management solutionsto organizations across diverse industries in Nigeria. With manyyears of proven experience, we partner with businesses to build high-performing teams and implement sustainable HR practices that drive growth.

Headquartered in Port Harcourt, Rivers State, BluePeak HR Services provides nationwide support to companies seeking reliable and efficient human capital solutions. Our team of seasoned HR professionals combines local market insight with global best practices to help clients attract, develop, and retain top talent.

At BluePeak HR Services, our mission is to empower organizations with innovative HR strategiesand a workforce that drives measurable results. We pride ourselves on professionalism, integrity, and a commitment to delivering people-centered solutionsthat enable clients to focus on their core business while we handle their human capital needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Marketer will be responsible for promoting the company&rsquo;s products and services, attracting new customers, and increasing sales through effective marketing strategies and partnerships.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement marketing strategies to promote sales
	Identify and pursue business opportunities, partnerships, and corporate clients to boost patronage.
	Conduct market research to understand customer preferences, competitors, and industry trends.
	Organize promotional activities, campaigns, and events to enhance brand visibility.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers, corporate clients, and event organizers.
	Collaborate with the social media team to promote marketing campaigns and special offers online.
	Monitor marketing performance and provide regular reports on sales growth and promotional outcomes.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years in marketing, preferably within the hospitality or service industry.
	Strong sales, negotiation, and customer relationship management skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resumes to:&nbsp;hr.bluepeak@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Marketer Job at BluePeak HR Services




        
    

        
        BluePeak HR Services is a trusted Human Resources consulting firm delivering recruitment and personnel management solutionsto organizations across diverse industries in Nigeria. With manyyears of proven experience, we partner with businesses to build high-performing teams and implement sustainable HR practices that drive growth.

Headquartered in Port Harcourt, Rivers State, BluePeak HR Services provides nationwide support to companies seeking reliable and efficient human capital solutions. Our team of seasoned HR professionals combines local market insight with global best practices to help clients attract, develop, and retain top talent.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



At BluePeak HR Services, our mission is to empower organizations with innovative HR strategiesand a workforce that drives measurable results. We pride ourselves on professionalism, integrity, and a commitment to delivering people-centered solutionsthat enable clients to focus on their core business while we handle their human capital needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Marketer will be responsible for promoting the company’s products and services, attracting new customers, and increasing sales through effective marketing strategies and partnerships.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement marketing strategies to promote sales
	Identify and pursue business opportunities, partnerships, and corporate clients to boost patronage.
	Conduct market research to understand customer preferences, competitors, and industry trends.
	Organize promotional activities, campaigns, and events to enhance brand visibility.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers, corporate clients, and event organizers.
	Collaborate with the social media team to promote marketing campaigns and special offers online.
	Monitor marketing performance and provide regular reports on sales growth and promotional outcomes.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years in marketing, preferably within the hospitality or service industry.
	Strong sales, negotiation, and customer relationship management skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resumes to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administration Officer",
  "description": "Magodo Specialist Hospital is committed to delivering medical care to the highest standard of professionalism and service. Our facility is a modern hospital established with the primary aim of meeting the medical needs of the Nigerian public who have for long yearned for a hospital that puts quality care at the centre of its business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administration Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Magodo Phase 2, Shangisha - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Manage client experience, ensuring satisfaction through timely delivery of service to maximize client retention.
	Ensure quality service and constantly monitor levels of service quality, and devise strategies to improve any shortfalls.
	Communicate effectively and build strong relationships with key stakeholders, including partners, clinical teams, suppliers, strategic partners, and external advisors.
	Compile accurate weekly management reports as required.
	Oversee all day-to-day operations of the administration functions and maintain a healthy administrative system of the Hospital.
	Work with the GM and other members of the administrative team in the generation and management of a sustainable pipeline of work that reflects the current and anticipated administrative strategy and business plans
	Organize and coordinate operations in ways that ensure maximum efficiency and effectiveness.
	Assess overall administrative performance against set objectives.
	Ensuring that all the facilities of the hospital are properly maintained in line with health and safety policies
	Responsible for ensuring the hospital wards are properly arranged and conducive.
	Ensuring the office is stocked with necessary supplies and that all equipment is working and properly maintained.
	Ensure safety in the Hospital by making sure that security is alert to their job.
	Management of waste disposal.
	Provide standard clerical duties as assigned, including mailing and communicating with clients and partners.
	Nurture a positive working environment and develop strong relationships with cross-functional teams and departments.
	Ensure legal compliance throughout administrative management.
	Perform any other duties from the higher authority.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc / HND Degree in accounting/management courses
	Age limit (Under 35 years)
	Minimum of 2 years of work experience
	Resident in Lagos (Around Magodo phase 2, Ketu, or any area close to Magodo phase 2)
	Good communication skills
	Computer skills
	Must be willing to do the night shift.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their&nbsp;curriculum vitae to:&nbsp;olushola.magodospecialisth@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-09",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "MAGODO SPECIALIST HOSPITAL"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }

Administration Officer Job at Magodo Specialist Hospital




        
    

        
        Magodo Specialist Hospital is committed to delivering medical care to the highest standard of professionalism and service. Our facility is a modern hospital established with the primary aim of meeting the medical needs of the Nigerian public who have for long yearned for a hospital that puts quality care at the centre of its business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administration Officer

Job Location: Magodo Phase 2, Shangisha - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage client experience, ensuring satisfaction through timely delivery of service to maximize client retention.
	Ensure quality service and constantly monitor levels of service quality, and devise strategies to improve any shortfalls.
	Communicate effectively and build strong relationships with key stakeholders, including partners, clinical teams, suppliers, strategic partners, and external advisors.
	Compile accurate weekly management reports as required.
	Oversee all day-to-day operations of the administration functions and maintain a healthy administrative system of the Hospital.
	Work with the GM and other members of the administrative team in the generation and management of a sustainable pipeline of work that reflects the current and anticipated administrative strategy and business plans
	Organize and coordinate operations in ways that ensure maximum efficiency and effectiveness.
	Assess overall administrative performance against set objectives.
	Ensuring that all the facilities of the hospital are properly maintained in line with health and safety policies
	Responsible for ensuring the hospital wards are properly arranged and conducive.
	Ensuring the office is stocked with necessary supplies and that all equipment is working and properly maintained.
	Ensure safety in the Hospital by making sure that security is alert to their job.
	Management of waste disposal.
	Provide standard clerical duties as assigned, including mailing and communicating with clients and partners.
	Nurture a positive working environment and develop strong relationships with cross-functional teams and departments.
	Ensure legal compliance throughout administrative management.
	Perform any other duties from the higher authority.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc / HND Degree in accounting/management courses
	Age limit (Under 35 years)
	Minimum of 2 years of work experience
	Resident in Lagos (Around Magodo phase 2, Ketu, or any area close to Magodo phase 2)
	Good communication skills
	Computer skills
	Must be willing to do the night shift.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their curriculum vitae to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Accountant Job at Secom Limited




        
    

        
        Secom Limited was established as a financial services company. It began as a financial service company with steadfast commitment to exceptional customer service, and overtime, has grown into a leading professional Company in Nigerian. Secom is a diverse and innovative company able to handle large scale transactions and also manage such operations seamlessly.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Akowonjo / Iyana Ipaja Axis - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain financial records and reports
	Handle payables and receivables
	Perform bank reconciliations
	Process payroll and statutory deductions
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Degree in Accounting/Finance with  2–3 years of experience
	Knowledge of accounting software (QuickBooks, Sage, Xero)
	Strong Excel skills.


Salary
N120,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using "Accountant" as the susbject of the email.
